options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -all_active_sinks
options.description: specifies that the result should be a dict of sink and delays

options.name: -cell_delays_only
options.description: specifies that cell delays only should be queried

options.name: -check_type
options.description: the check type to query

options.name: -delay_corner
options.description: the delay corner to query ((delay_corner), optional)

options.name: -delay_type
options.description: the delay type to query

options.name: -edge
options.description: specifies the edge to query

options.name: -exclude_pin_insertion_delays
options.description: specifies that the resultant delays should exclude any pin insertion delay

options.name: -from
options.description: specifies the pin to query delays from ((instTerm|term), optional)

options.name: -longest
options.description: specifies that the longest path delay should be queried

options.name: -path_length
options.description: {half_perim pin_to_pin_steiner routed} Report by the distance from the root measured using the specified distance metric.

options.name: -real_delays_only
options.description: specifies that real delays only should be queried

options.name: -shortest
options.description: specifies that the shortest path delay should be queried

options.name: -skew
options.description: specifies that skew should be queried

options.name: -skew_group
options.description: the skew group to query

options.name: -summarize_stage_depth
options.description: Report by the number of cells of the given tcl list of cell types rather than delay. Possible values are buffer, inverter, logic, clock_gate, generator or *.

options.name: -through
options.description: specifies the pin to query delays through ((instTerm|term), optional)

options.name: -to
options.description: specifies the pin to query delays to ((instTerm|term), optional)

options.name: -virtual_delays_only
options.description: specifies that virtual delays only should be queried

options.name: -wire_delays_only
options.description: specifies that wire delays only should be queried
